stages.concept:
# Unit 130: 관계대명사 what vs. 의문사 what - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **관계대명사 what**과 **의문사 what**의 차이에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **관계대명사 what** — ~하는 것 (= the thing that)

> I know **what** she wants.
> 나는 그녀가 원하는 **것**을 안다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **의문사 what** — 무엇 (~인지)

> I don't know **what** she wants.
> 나는 그녀가 **무엇을** 원하는지 모르겠다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 같은 문장이라도 해석이 달라질 수 있어요!

> Tell me **what** happened.
> → 관계대명사: 일어난 **것**을 말해줘.
> → 의문사: **무슨 일이** 일어났는지 말해줘.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 구별 Tip:

> **'~하는 것'**으로 해석되면 → **관계대명사**
> **'무엇(~인지)'**으로 해석되면 → **의문사**

> **What** I need is money. → 내가 필요한 **것**은 돈이다. (관계대명사)
> **What** do you need? → **무엇을** 필요로 하니? (의문사)

**Q. 다음 중 밑줄 친 what이 '~하는 것(관계대명사)'으로 해석되는 문장을 고르세요.**
1. Tell me <u>what</u> your name is. (너의 이름이 '무엇'인지 말해줘)
2. <u>What</u> made you change your mind? (너를 마음 바꾸게 한 것은 '무엇'이니)
3. That is <u>what</u> they are looking for. (저것이 그들이 찾고 있는 '것'이다) ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 훌륭해요! 해석상 '~하는 것'으로 들어맞고, 문장 안에서 명사절(보어 역할)을 이끌고 있는 3번의 what이 바로 관계대명사랍니다. 

🧑‍🎓 학생: '~하는 것'이면 관계대명사, '무엇'이면 의문사! 해석으로 구별하면 되는 거군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 130: 관계대명사 what vs. 의문사 what - 연습문제 A

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분이 해당하는 것을 고르시오.
He didn't answer what I asked before. (     )
> **정답** 관계대명사

---

**02.** What did you eat for lunch? ?
> **정답** 의문사

---

**03.** What I like most is music. ?
> **정답** 관계대명사

---

**04.** What is your name? ?
> **정답** 의문사

---

**05.** She knows what he wants. ?
> **정답** 관계대명사

---

**06.** 다음 문장에서 what의 역할을 고르시오.
I don't know what happened.
> **정답** 의문사

---

**07.** What she said was true.
> **정답** 관계대명사

---

**08.** What time is it?
> **정답** 의문사

---

**09.** Show me what you made.
> **정답** 관계대명사

---

**10.** I wonder what he is doing.
> **정답** 의문사

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그가 원하는 것은 자유이다. (관계대명사)
he wants is freedom.
> **정답** What

---

**12.** 너는 무엇을 좋아하니? (의문사)
do you like?
> **정답** What

---

**13.** 그녀가 말한 것은 사실이었다. (관계대명사)
she said was true.
> **정답** What

---

**14.** 이것은 무엇이니? (의문사)
is this?
> **정답** What

---

**15.** 내가 필요한 것은 시간이다. (관계대명사)
I need is time.
> **정답** What

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀가 한 것은 훌륭했다. (관계대명사)
What did she was great
> **정답** What / she / did / was / great

---

**17.** 너는 무엇을 먹었니? (의문사)
What eat did you
> **정답** What / did / you / eat

---

**18.** 내가 좋아하는 것은 독서이다. (관계대명사)
What like I is reading
> **정답** What / I / like / is / reading

---

**19.** 그가 무엇을 하고 있는지 궁금하다. (의문사)
wonder I what he is doing
> **정답** I / wonder / what / he / is / doing

---

**20.** 그가 산 것을 보여 줘. (관계대명사)
Show what me he bought
> **정답** Show / me / what / he / bought
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 130: 관계대명사 what vs. 의문사 what - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
A: I don't understand _______________ you are
talking about.
B: Well, I am just telling you ________________ I
heard from Tom.
what
that
which
whom
> **정답** what

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
People didn't know _______________ the police were
looking for.
But they just told them everything ______________
they saw that day.
what - that
that - which
what - what
whom - what
> **정답** what - that

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
_____________ the teacher wanted the students to
do was to focus on the class.
But the students didn't understand __________ the
teacher was trying to say.
What - which
That - what
That - that
What - what
> **정답** What - what

---

**04.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을
고르시오.
<보기> I really liked what she wrote.
I wanted to know what time it was.
I want to know what the boy's name is.
Can you tell me what happened at the
concert?
I ate what my mother cooked this morning.
> **정답** I ate what my mother cooked this morning.

---

**05.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을
고르시오.
<보기> I wonder what my mother is cooking.
What she wants to be is a dancer.
Amy ate what her mother made for her.
What do you think I should do in this
situation?
What is more interesting is that she came to
the party alone.
> **정답** What do you think I should do in this situation?

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Tom은 그녀가 무엇을 말하려고 하는지 이해하지 못했다.
Tom couldn't understand what she was
trying to say.
Tom couldn't understand the thing that she
was trying to say.
Tom couldn't understand what was she
trying to say.
Tom couldn't understand which she was
trying to say.
> **정답** Tom couldn't understand the thing that she was trying to say.
> **정답Tom couldn't understand what she was trying to say.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
내가 기대했던 것은 현실이 되지 않았다.
The thing what I expected did not come true.
What I expected did not come true.
That I expected did not come true.
What did I expect did not come true.
> **정답** What I expected did not come true.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 Amy이 선물로 그에게 무엇을 주었는지 잊었다.
Tom forgot which Amy gave him as a
present.
Tom forgot what did Amy give him as a
present.
Tom forgot what Amy gave him as a
present.
Tom forgot that Amy gave him as a
present.
> **정답** Tom forgot what Amy gave him as a present.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I wonder what is for dinner.
What they didn't say was not that important.
That I really need is time.
I don't remember what his name is.
> **정답** That I really need is time.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I cannot decide that I should choose from the
menu.
Amy cleaned up her room which was untidy.
I want to know what she will get me for my
birthday.
Flowers and cards are what made her smile.
> **정답** I cannot decide that I should choose from the menu.

---

**11.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을
고르시오.
<보기> I am wondering what Tom is making.
I felt sorry for what I had done to her.
What he ordered was my favorite dish.
He asked me what I did yesterday.
It was not what she came here for.
> **정답** He asked me what I did yesterday.

---

**12.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을
고르시오.
<보기> She wrote down what he was saying.
Mom asked me what I was hiding from her.
Please tell me what happened to Amy.
She wanted to know what he was thinking.
I bought what the clerk recommended.
> **정답** I bought what the clerk recommended.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Amy doesn't understand what was he trying
to say.
She was looking at what he brought to her.
That he said to his mom was rude.
I am not interested in that is not mine.
> **정답** She was looking at what he brought to her.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom didn't finish that he had to finish.
I wanted to know which she was reading at
the desk.
She told me which happened to her last night.
What made me sad was that he left so
suddenly.
> **정답** What made me sad was that he left so suddenly.

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I tried to hear that he was
whispering.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → what

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I wonder what told my sister
to my mom.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** told my sister → my sister told

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
What he gave me are not
mine.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** are → is (was)

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
This is something what the
teacher mentioned in class.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** what → that

---

**19.** 다음 중 관계대명사 what에 해당되는 문장 번호를 모두
고르시오. (2개)
(1) He was supposed to do what his boss ordered him
to do.
(2) I don't know what is in the bag.
(3) What I had to do was to finish writing an essay
before midnight.
(4) Could you tell me what he ordered for lunch?
> **정답** 1, 3

---

**20.** 다음 중 의문사 what에 해당되는 문장 번호를 모두
고르시오.
(1) I broke my arm and everyone asked me what
happened.
(2) He asked the woman what time it was.
(3) I felt sorry for what I said to her.
(4) What I really want to be is a fashion designer.
> **정답** 1, 2
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 130 관계대명사 what vs. 의문사 what중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
나는 그가 무엇을 먹고 있었는지 알고 싶었다.
힌트 (     ) be, eat
I wanted to know  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 what, he, was, eating

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
그녀가 우리에게 소개해 주었던 것은 매우 흥미로웠다.
힌트 (     ) introduce to
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  was very
interesting.
정답 What, she, introduced, to, us

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
Tom은 그의 엄마가 요리하고 있는 것의 냄새를 좋아한다.
힌트 (     ) what, mom, be, cook
Tom likes the smell of  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 what, his, mom, is, cooking

---

**04.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
That he said to me was not true.
→  (     )  to me was not true.
정답 What he said

---

**05.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
Moore couldn't see the thing what was coming to
her.
→ Moore couldn't see  (     )  was
coming to her.
정답 the thing which (the thing that, what)

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
나는 Emily가 먹고 있던 것을 주문했다.
힌트 (     ) eating, what, Emily, was
I ordered  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 what, Emily, was, eating

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
그것이 그녀에게 무슨 의미였는지 나는 모르겠다.
힌트 (     ) to, what, her, it, meant
I have no idea  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 what, it, meant, to, her

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
그는 자신이 말하려던 것을 까먹었다.
힌트 (     ) to, he, what, trying, say, was
He forgot  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 what, he, was, trying, to, say

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 주어진 표현을 이용하여 영어로 쓰시오.
나는 이 단어가 무슨 뜻인지 모르겠다.
힌트 (     ) have no idea, mean, this word
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 I, have, no, idea, what, this, word, means

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 주어진 표현을 이용하여 영어로 쓰시오.
너가 내게 말했던 것은 매우 도움이 됐어.
힌트 (     ) tell, be, helpful, very
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 What, you, told, me, was, very, helpful

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 130: 관계대명사 what vs. 의문사 what - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
A: I don't understand _______________ you are saying.
B: Well, I am just telling you ________________ I heard from Amy. what that which whom
> 정답: what

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
People didn't know _______________ the teacher was looking for.
But they just told her everything ______________ they remembered that day.
what - that that - which what - what whom - what
> 정답: what - that

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
_____________ the coach wanted the players to do was to focus on the game.
But the players didn't understand __________ the coach was trying to say.
What - which That - what That - that What - what
> 정답: What - what

---

**04.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> I really liked what she cooked.
I wanted to know what time it started.
I want to know what the girl's hobby is.
Can you tell me what happened at the show?
I ate what my grandmother prepared this morning.
> 정답: I ate what my grandmother prepared this morning.

---

**05.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> I wonder what my father is building.
What she wants to study is science.
Tom ate what his sister made for him.
What do you think I should wear to the party?
What is more surprising is that he came without telling anyone.
> 정답: What do you think I should wear to the party?

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Tom은 그녀가 무엇을 하려고 하는지 이해하지 못했다.
Tom couldn't understand what she was trying to do.
Tom couldn't understand the thing that she was trying to say.,
Tom couldn't understand what she was trying to say. trying to do.
Tom couldn't understand what was she trying to do.
Tom couldn't understand which she was trying to do.
> 정답: Tom couldn't understand the thing that she was trying to say., Tom couldn't understand what she was trying to say.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
내가 바랐던 것은 현실이 되지 않았다.
The thing what I wished did not come true.
What I wished did not come true.
That I wished did not come true.
What did I wish did not come true.
> 정답: What I wished did not come true.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 Tom이 생일에 그녀에게 무엇을 주었는지 잊었다.
Amy forgot which Tom gave her on her birthday.
Amy forgot what did Tom give her on her birthday.
Amy forgot what Tom gave her on her birthday.
Amy forgot that Tom gave her on her birthday.
> 정답: Amy forgot what Tom gave her on her birthday.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I wonder what is for lunch.
What they didn't explain was not that important.
That I really want is a vacation.
I don't remember what her address is.
> 정답: That I really want is a vacation.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I cannot decide that I should pick from the list.
Tom cleaned up his room which was messy.
I want to know what she will cook for dinner.
Smiles and kindness are what made him popular.
> 정답: I cannot decide that I should pick from the list.

---

**11.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> I am wondering what Amy is painting.
I felt grateful for what I had received from him.
What she ordered was my favorite dessert.
He asked me what I ate yesterday.
It was not what he came here for.
> 정답: He asked me what I ate yesterday.

---

**12.** 다음 <보기>의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 고르시오.
<보기> He wrote down what she was explaining.
Mom asked me what I was hiding in my room.
Please tell me what happened to Tom.
He wanted to know what she was planning.
I bought what the salesman suggested.
> 정답: I bought what the salesman suggested.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom doesn't understand what was she trying to say.
She was looking at what he made for her.
That he said to his dad was rude.
I am not interested in that is not useful.
> 정답: She was looking at what he made for her.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom didn't finish that he had to finish.
I wanted to know which she was reading at the café.
She told me which happened to her last week.
What made me happy was that she came back.
> 정답: What made me happy was that she came back.

---
